releaseNotes:
🚀 What's New in v1.2.0.5

• Added real-time GPU monitoring.
• Improved CPU and memory monitoring accuracy.
• Optimized dashboard performance for smoother updates.
• Reduced resource usage during background monitoring.
• Fixed several UI rendering issues.
• Improved application startup speed.
• Fixed stability issues that could cause unexpected crashes.
• Enhanced hardware detection and compatibility.
• Improved update system reliability.
• General bug fixes and performance improvements.
